arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ECR repository.

encryption_configuration.description: The encryption configuration for the repository, including type and KMS key.

id.description: The ID of the ECR repository.

image_scanning_configuration.description: Configuration for image scanning on the repository, indicating if scan on push is enabled.

image_tag_mutability.description: The tag mutability setting for the repository, which defines if image tags can be overwritten.

most_recent_image_tags.description: A list of the most recent image tags in the repository.

registry_id.description: The registry ID where the repository is located.

repository_url.description: The URL of the ECR repository.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the repository.
